case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. OLIVER AGUIRRE et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, OLIVER DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-26-2013
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED JAN-06-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, OLIVER

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $293.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, OLIVER
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585
